vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Provide structural support and aerodynamic profile for the wing
Include lightening pockets for weight reduction
Ensure leading edge sock and trailing edge taper integration
Facilitate control surface actuation via hinge line
Maintain thermal management through foam core
Allow service access for battery replacement and maintenance

verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: Estimated mass is 250g, within acceptable range.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to sun exposure on CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Implement thermal expansion management strategies in design.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex interface requirements.
risk.mit: Provide detailed assembly instructions and alignment aids.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient load path continuity if fittings are not properly integrated.
risk.mit: Ensure all fittings are correctly positioned and secured.

risk.desc: Risk of improper anti-rotation key functionality if not precisely manufactured.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough quality control checks on anti-rotation key components.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under aerodynamic loads if materials are not adequately chosen.
risk.mit: Select appropriate materials and conduct stress analysis tests.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers lift and landing loads from wing to fuselage.
Heat from sun absorbed by CFRP spar.
Prevents rotation during wing flap actuation.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Support structures oriented for easy removal post-printing
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for surface finish and dimensional accuracy

verification_focus.description: Ensure lift, landing, and payload loads trace through continuous structure: spar to carry-through to fuselage frames, with fittings at every load transfer.

Check structural integrity under aerodynamic loads.

risk.desc: Potential for increased weight due to material selection.
risk.mit: Review material choices and optimize for weight reduction.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference if cable routing is not optimized.
risk.mit: Conduct an electromagnetic compatibility analysis and reroute cables as needed.

risk.desc: Structural integrity may be compromised if spar socket is not properly reinforced.
risk.mit: Add reinforcing ribs or plates around the spar socket area.

risk.desc: Access to balance leads might be obstructed if window size is insufficient.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the balance lead window for better visibility.

risk.desc: Misalignment of connectors could occur if mating surfaces are not precisely aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment of mating surfaces and use keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating.

Increase visibility of balance leads for easier monitoring during flight.
